task_description: Implement three new professional modules: Motor Start Analysis (IEC 60947 + DS/HD 60364-5-52), Harmonic Analysis & Filter (EN 61000-3-2/12 + DS/HD 60364), and VFD/Frequency Converter Sizing (IEC 61800 + DS/HD 60364). Each with click-only trilingual UI, conservative calculations, and comprehensive tests.
